title: rubus × decliviformis
intro: Rubus × decliviformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Tibetan raspberry, is a hybrid of the European raspberry and the Himalayan raspberry, which is native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of ellagic acid, which has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × decliviformis include its potential to prevent cancer, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Rubus × decliviformis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
